# The Backend Built forAgentic Development

Give agents everything they need

to ship fullstack apps.

## If You Use AI Coding Agents, Use InsForge

Proven by [benchmarks](https://mcpmark.ai/leaderboard/mcp). AI coding agents perform better on backend tasks with InsForge

1.6x

Faster

InsForge

150s

Supabase

239s

Postgres

215s

30%

Fewer Tokens

InsForge

8.2M

Supabase

11.6M

Postgres

10.4M

1.7x

Higher Accuracy

InsForge

47.6%

Supabase

28.6%

Postgres

38.1%

[View full benchmark report](https://insforge.dev/blog/mcpmark-benchmark-results)

Supports Any Framework You Need

![React](https://insforge.dev/assets/logos/react.svg)

![Vue](https://insforge.dev/assets/logos/vue.svg)

See what others were saying about InsForge

Developer

I never touched a database before. With InsForge, I didn’t even realize one was created until my app was already storing data.

Mitchell Chandler

Developer

No dashboards, no configs, no endless setup. Just InsForge. I describe what I need and my agent builds it.

Sandeep Gupta

CEO of LionAI

It feels like cheating. My coding agent handles the frontend, InsForge covers the backend. Together they just ship.

Josh Zhao

Technical Consultant

Software Engineer

Haitao Hu

Data Analyst

Dylan Duan

Content Creator

Creator of THA

Founder of PawPals

Before InsForge, debugging with Lovable was a rabbit hole. Every fix just led to another error. After connecting InsForge, the loop stopped and things finally worked.

![Forrest](https://insforge.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Favatars%2Fforrest.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Forrest

Co-founder & CTO @Forest Market

I asked my agent for Google login and InsForge handled everything out of the box. No setup, it just worked.

![Barry Wang](https://insforge.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Favatars%2Fbarry_wang.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Barry Wang

Investor @MindWorks Capital

InsForge gave this out of the box. It connected straight to OpenAI and stored chat history in the database. My Cursor built the chatbot for me right away.

Github DiscussionJoin Discord

Riccardo Mancini

Developer

I never touched a database before. With InsForge, I didn’t even realize one was created until my app was already storing data.

Mitchell Chandler

Developer

No dashboards, no configs, no endless setup. Just InsForge. I describe what I need and my agent builds it.

Sandeep Gupta

CEO of LionAI

It feels like cheating. My coding agent handles the frontend, InsForge covers the backend. Together they just ship.

Josh Zhao

Technical Consultant

Prototype → product in one weekend. The only difference? I plugged my agent into InsForge.

Golden Meng

Software Engineer

Hooked up Cursor with InsForge and suddenly my agent wasn't just writing UI. It shipped the whole app. Unreal.

Haitao Hu

Data Analyst

I tried Firebase, Supabase, even AWS dashboards. InsForge felt different, just connect and code. My agent handled everything.

Dylan Duan

Content Creator

Connecting Claude Code to InsForge was like flipping a switch. One minute I had a prototype, next minute I had a real product.

Vincent Gao

Creator of THA

I love Supabase for certain projects, but for agent-driven coding InsForge is in another league. Zero friction.

Software Engineer

Cursor plus InsForge is deadly. I typed 'build a blog app' and suddenly comments were flowing into a live database.
